data.name: Elf World Adventure 9: Summer Episode!
data.detailed_description:
DESCRIPTION:


Elf World Adventure 9: Summer Episode is a special summer edition of the popular H-game series in the anime and puzzle genre, where you will experience the hot sun, warm sea, and charming elf girls in light summer outfits. Immerse yourself in the atmosphere of a resort, enjoy relaxing music, and collect images that will give you a summer mood any time of the year.

The game will delight you not only with colorful and challenging puzzles but also with many achievements that you can use to decorate your Steam profile. Unlock all the illustrations, complete the gallery, and spend the perfect summer vacation in the company of beautiful elf girls.

GAMEPLAY:

In Elf World Adventure 9: Summer Episode, you will enjoy an exciting puzzle-solving process, where each completed puzzle unlocks a new illustration of beautiful elf girls. As you progress through the levels, you will fill up your gallery and enjoy all the unlocked images. Simple controls and an intuitive interface make the game accessible to everyone, while the summer atmosphere and relaxing music will help you forget about everyday worries.

GAME FEATURES:

  • Hentai experience: a mix of spicy content and engaging puzzles.
  • Summer atmosphere: beaches, sunshine, and light outfits.
  • Beautiful elf girls: unique anime-style designs.
  • Relaxing music: the perfect soundtrack for your game.
  • Steam achievements: decorate your profile with vibrant rewards.
  • Many levels: challenge yourself with a variety of puzzles.

data.short_description: Elf World Adventure 9: Summer Episode — a summer adventure in the world of elf girls with puzzles, vibrant illustrations, and a relaxing atmosphere.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 保加利亞文, 匈牙利文, 丹麥文, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 簡體中文, 韓文, 荷蘭文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 俄文, 泰文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 芬蘭文, 瑞典文, 日文, 越南文, 印尼語

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 (64-bit)
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-2300
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GeForce GTX 760 or Radeon HD 7850
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 (64-bit)
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-7400 or AMD Ryzen 3
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GeForce GTX 960 or Radeon R9 380X
  • DirectX: 版本：12
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10 (64-bit)
  • Processor: Intel Core i5-2300
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Graphics: GeForce GTX 760 or Radeon HD 7850
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 1 GB available space
  • Sound Card: DirectX
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10 (64-bit)
  • Processor: Intel Core i5-7400 or AMD Ryzen 3
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: GeForce GTX 960 or Radeon R9 380X
  • DirectX: Version 12
  • Storage: 1 GB available space
  • Sound Card: DirectX
